mapper.insert: insert into order_status (order_id, order_status, created_time, pay_time, deliver_time, success_time, close_time, comment_time) values (#{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deliverTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{successTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{closeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{commentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update order_status set order_status = #{orderStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, pay_time = #{payTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, deliver_time = #{deliverTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, success_time = #{successTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, close_time = #{closeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, comment_time = #{commentTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select order_id, order_status, created_time, pay_time, deliver_time, success_time, close_time, comment_time from order_status where order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
select order_id, order_status, created_time, pay_time, deliver_time, success_time, close_time, comment_time from order_status
